title: Reed Diffuser Set White Flower Scent with 10 Sticks Golden Glitter Bottle, 200ml Flower Diffusers Narrow Spaces for 120 Days, Home Fragrance Air Freshener Long Lasting for Bathroom Bedroom Office
features: A Feast for the Eyes and Nose: As the diffuser sticks are gently stirred, a mesmerizing golden current flows within the bottle, offering a feast for the eyes before the fragrance even hits the air. Infused with the delicate scents of jasmine, lily, and a bouquet of white flowers, easily transport you to a tranquil garden in full bloom.

Made for Narrow Spaces: This reed diffuser features a space saving slim square profile, designed to fit into tight corners, tight shelves, or ensuite bathrooms. Enjoy a lasting fragrance boost in even the most cramped quarters,transforming the cramped quarters into a fresh and inviting retreat.

Long lasting Fragrance: This reed diffuser releases delicate scents for up to 120 days, providing four months of fresh air for your space. Adjust intensity by using 2 to 4 premium fiber reed sticks (Expert recommendation). Tip: Flip the reeds weekly or refresh when the scent fades your air freshener experience becomes effortless.

Elegant Multifunctional Decor: This reed diffuser set elevates the ambiance of any space, perfect for homes, living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, offices, and more. Featuring a stylish glass bottle has a beautiful golden shimmer, it serves as a decorative focal point whether placed on bookshelves, desks, or bathroom countertops. The reed diffusers emit an elegant, subtle fragrance, creating a luxurious and inviting ambiance.

Premium Gift Packaging: This diffuser gift is perfect for yourself, family, friends, and colleagues, suitable for any occasion including holidays, birthdays, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, weddings, housewarming parties, gatherings, and thank you gifts. The harmonious blend of fragrance and elegant presentation creates a heartfelt gift. The reed diffuser soothing scent profile is widely cherished, while the long lasting fragrance ensures the recipient will remember your thoughtful gesture.
